name: sun
role: developer-experience

Rewriting the onboarding docs this week so a new hire can get the stack running
locally in under an hour. Lots of screenshots, a clean `docker compose up` path,
and a troubleshooting section. I touch the `docs/` tree and a couple of example
config snippets in the README — nothing in the live service configs.

The only code I'll write is a small seed script so the local DB has demo data.
Mostly prose and diagrams. No deadline, just want it done before the next cohort
starts.
